title: catalog audit lacks per-visual semantic overrides
evidence: smoke reports H7 with fallback_ids=0, empty_captions=17 for inline diagrams/tables that have no explicit caption or only weak labels like Figure 1/Table 1; extract_rules.yaml cannot attach per-visual semantic ids or exclude reasons
proposal: add a reviewable per-book visual-overrides channel so audit-book can mark figure/table semantic ids or exclusions without changing parser/catalog engine behavior globally
